TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_fafoy_no_lotok, title = O_fafoy_no_lotok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_fafoy_no_lotok} }

S.FORM: == O fafoy no lotok == O fafoy no lotok hananay . o miri'angay to tamdaw . Mikari'ang aca to pinaloma a losay . Nanitini i tolo patek mitolo ko takaraw no lotok , tahini i hadhad ko piresapan no fafoy no lotok . Ano i pala to , i semosemotan , i 'aw'awlan ,itiniaca i pamatangan a hadhad , Ira ma'araw ko naripa'an nangra . Ano kasienawan , malokelon tayni i hadhad a miliyas to sienaw no lotok . Ano mahofoc ko tawinaan fafoy no lotok .ira ko sepat , oroma aenem saan ko kaci wawa ningra .Ora ciciw no fafoy , caay piliyas to wina , tahira i kato'asan ningra .So'elinay , safeleng saan cangra a miresap a talacowacowa , mikilim to kakaenen .O mikaenan no fafoy i , cowa kapili' , o 'arikak , fao , limit , o papah ,ato masamaamaanay a pinalengaw . Maemin a maemod nangra . O patinako no sowal to fafoy no lotok i hekal . o masililay , o matokaay sanay .Cowa kahatira ko pinangan no fafoy . Ya fafoy no lotok hananay , o ci'icelay , ratiktikay a rafihfih . cekak saan ko tangila , Ano masatamdaw to ka to'as nira ,matiyato o tofor ka tata'ang . sacira'it saan , o sapiri'ang nira to cimacima ato sapingorngor nira to sera . So'elinay , malitemoh no mi'adopay ko hatiniay a fafoy , pisafaloco' a misi'ayaw to kapiri'angaw ningra . o waco sato ko sapaosos milifet a makakalat .Iraay ko madoka'ay a waco to pina kalat nora fafoy . Matini i niyaro' . O katangican no mi'adopay a ci tama' ko fafoy no lotok . Ano ci tama' a mi'adop cangra . O tadamaanay a mi'adopay cingra sanay . Oroma sato pateli to saso'erec ato masamaamaanay a tilo . Ano pina a romi'ad , tayra miliso' tora tilo . alatek ira ko 'angtolay to , ira ko ma'oripay ho . Panokay sato tora tama' . Mipafetis to kalas no niyaro' ato pacakat itini i pita'ongan to mato'asay . Todong paliyaw ira ho kenaira a tama' . Mililiw ko loma' a mitahidang to salikaka mapolong malafi a komaen toyatama' .Ya tayraay malafi .mihawikid to takid to sapisolac to roray no mi'adopay . Kaniwen a mimaan . kaeso'ay makaen ko titi no fafoy no lotok . Tamekhan ko fanges nira . salangotngot sanay kiya .oya pasikaenhan to epah . tatodong sanay Fafuy pala—野豬 I luma'ay fafuy atu i palaay fafuy, tansul mahapinang ku nika sasiruma. U Fafuy Pala i, kakaya' ku pising, tata'ang ku funguh atu faluhang; ma'ipuc ku kaikur, miming ku wa'ay. U kakaya' nu tireng maedeng ccay laya' tahira ccay laya' ira ku pangkiw, u karteng 80~100 a tingting, u 'urip nira 10~21 ku mihcaan.U cengel nu fanuh nira i, matiya makusasay ku kakuhting, ira ku matiyaay u pangsuy. Maedef i kitakit ku lenak nu Fafuy pala, dengan makdalay , takaraway lutuk atu kietecay pala caay katatudung tu Fafuy pala. Kakaenen nu Fafuy pala, u rengus, heci nu kilang, lamit, fau^, fita'ol, 'du, 'uner,takulil atu mihufucan ho a malunem…makaenay ho ma^min mawlah. U tatirengan nu Fafuy pala sa'imeced saan, ^ca ka ci simal ku titi nira, saka matalaw tu si^naw. Tanu ra'it han nira mikarkar ku sra a misadihif , malu kadikuan nira. Anu kacihrangan i, maulah a mirunang i snasna'an . Kafahka'an i, makurac ku kafuti'an nira, nawhani, iraira aca ku katumai'an atu kamisi'an nira i paputal, caay pipatedu. U pinangan nu Fafuy pala i, u masafelengay a malahaklung ku 'urip nangra, ira ku tusay-pulu' ku kaadihay. Tura sasifu'an nangra a malahakelung i, caka^ca ira ku 2~3 ci hawikiday tu ciciw a tawinaan a malacafay. U 'utuyan a fafuy anu sapilamuan ta micamul a mikihatiya. Na hufucen ku Fafuy pala, 18 ku tawinaan ta palamu; 3~4 a mihcaan ku 'otoyan ta manga'ay milamu. 112~130 a rumi'ad ku kacitiyadan nu Fafuy pala, ccay hufuc 2~6 ku ciciw , anu adihay tahira i 12, falu lipay kanca mu^tep lipay ta maktun ku picucu. Mihcacaan nu canglah atu lala'edan nu kacihrangan atu laluudan ku kahufucan nu Fafuy pala. Nanu tu'asan nu Yingcumin ma^min u mafana'ay a mi'adup ku 'urip; itiya:ho sahtu u tumekday ku luwad, (1).Tala lutuk mikarkar tu sra a misakfeng , (2).Miteker tu Waya misa fihkac, (3).Patli tu piyak . Palitemek tu fana' nu tireng . Ccay lipay kina ccay a milisu', altek safulafulad satu awa ku tama'. Naw? I palapala:ay aca ku 'urip nu Fafuy, mafana' tu saka'uripaw; saka, caay ka sadak tu rumi'ad, milimek i dihidihifan a mafuti'. Saka, citama' ho tu Fafuy ku mi'tiluay i, u edef nu niyaru'ay tamdaw a mahmek a ma'inal. Ruma satu, malacafay ku 2~3 tamdaw a masacefang, ika'ayaw ku wacu tanu ngusu' han nira a mihiphip tahira ka tamaan. Anu matama ku 'utuyan a Fafuy pala pina'un, iraay ku ra'it nira sapiri'ang, cacay ku wacu misi'ayaw caay ku papakafilu. Anini 'alumantu ku pakaenay tu Fafuy pala i niyaru', anu pakaynien i kalumuwad nu sakatanektekaw nu tatirengan sanay a harateng atu saka iraaw tu nikaira i, u kanga'ayan nu mawmahay a mitanam pakaen.
S.PHON: == o~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk == o~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk ħananaj . o~u miriʡaŋaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw . mikariʡaŋ aʦa to~u pinaɾo~uma a ɾo~usaj . nanitini i to~uɾo~u patək mito~uɾo~u ko~u takaraw no~u ɾo~uto~uk , taħini i ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ ko~u pirəsapan no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u i paɾa to~u , i səmo~usəmo~utan , i ʡawʡawɾan ,itiniaʦa i pamataŋan a ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ , ira maʡaraw ko~u naripaʡan naŋra . ano~u kasiənawan , maɾo~ukəɾo~un tajni i ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ a miɾijas to~u siənaw no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u maħo~ufo~uʦ ko~u tawinaan fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk .ira ko~u səpat , o~uro~uma aənəm saan ko~u kaʦi wawa niŋra .o~ura ʦiʦiw no~u fafo~uj , ʦaaj piɾijas to~u wina , taħira i kato~uʡasan niŋra .so~uʡəɾinaj , safəɾəŋ saan ʦaŋra a mirəsap a taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~uwa , mikiɾim to~u kakaənən .o~u mikaənan no~u fafo~uj i , ʦo~uwa kapiɾiʡ , o~u ʡarikak , fao~u , ɾimit , o~u papaħ ,ato~u masamaamaanaj a pinaɾəŋaw . maəmin a maəmo~uɬ~ɮ naŋra . o~u patinako~u no~u so~uwaɾ to~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk i ħəkaɾ . o~u masiɾiɾaj , o~u mato~ukaaj sanaj .ʦo~uwa kaħatira ko~u pinaŋan no~u fafo~uj . ja fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk ħananaj , o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj , ratiktikaj a rafiħfiħ . ʦəkak saan ko~u taŋiɾa , ano~u masatamɬ~ɮaw to~u ka to~uʡas nira ,matijato~u o~u to~ufo~ur ka tataʡaŋ . saʦiraʡit saan , o~u sapiriʡaŋ nira to~u ʦimaʦima ato~u sapiŋo~urŋo~ur nira to~u səra . so~uʡəɾinaj , maɾitəmo~uħ no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ko~u ħatiniaj a fafo~uj , pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a misiʡajaw to~u kapiriʡaŋaw niŋra . o~u waʦo~u sato~u ko~u sapao~uso~us miɾifət a makakaɾat .iraaj ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj a waʦo~u to~u pina kaɾat no~ura fafo~uj . matini i nijaro~uʡ . o~u kataŋiʦan no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a ʦi tamaʡ ko~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u ʦi tamaʡ a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ʦaŋra . o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ʦiŋra sanaj . o~uro~uma sato~u patəɾi to~u saso~uʡərəʦ ato~u masamaamaanaj a tiɾo~u . ano~u pina a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ , tajra miɾiso~uʡ to~ura tiɾo~u . aɾatək ira ko~u ʡaŋto~uɾaj to~u , ira ko~u maʡo~uripaj ħo~u . pano~ukaj sato~u to~ura tamaʡ . mipafətis to~u kaɾas no~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u paʦakat itini i pitaʡo~uŋan to~u mato~uʡasaj . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paɾijaw ira ħo~u kənaira a tamaʡ . miɾiɾiw ko~u ɾo~umaʡ a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u saɾikaka mapo~uɾo~uŋ maɾafi a ko~umaən to~ujatamaʡ .ja tajraaj maɾafi .miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u takiɬ~ɮ to~u sapiso~uɾaʦ to~u ro~uraj no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj . kaniwən a mimaan . kaəso~uʡaj makaən ko~u titi no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . taməkħan ko~u faŋəs nira . saɾaŋo~utŋo~ut sanaj kija .o~uja pasikaənħan to~u əpaħ . tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sanaj fafo~u~uj paɾa*** i ɾo~u~umaʡaj fafo~u~uj ato~u~u i paɾaaj fafo~u~uj, tanso~u~uɾ maħapinaŋ ko~u~u nika sasiro~u~uma. o~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i, kakajaʡ ko~u~u pisiŋ, tataʡaŋ ko~u~u fo~u~uŋo~u~uħ ato~u~u faɾo~u~uħaŋ; maʡipo~u~uʦ ko~u~u kaiko~u~ur, mimiŋ ko~u~u waʡaj. o~u~u kakajaʡ no~u~u tirəŋ maəɬ~ɮəŋ ʦʦaj ɾajaʡ taħira ʦʦaj ɾajaʡ ira ko~u~u paŋkiw, o~u~u kartəŋ **~*** a tiŋtiŋ, o~u~u ʡo~u~urip nira **~** ko~u~u miħʦaan.o~u~u ʦəŋəɾ no~u~u fano~u~uħ nira i, matija mako~u~usasaj ko~u~u kako~u~uħtiŋ, ira ko~u~u matijaaj o~u~u paŋso~u~uj. maəɬ~ɮəf i kitakit ko~u~u ɾənak no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ɬ~ɮəŋan makɬ~ɮaɾaj , takarawaj ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ato~u~u kiətəʦaj paɾa ʦaaj katato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa. kakaənən no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, o~u~u rəŋo~u~us, ħəʦi no~u~u kiɾaŋ, ɾamit, fao~u~uʔ, fitaʡo~uɾ, ʡɬ~ɮo~u~u, ʡo~u~unər,tako~u~uɾiɾ ato~u~u miħo~u~ufo~u~uʦan ħo~u a maɾo~u~unəm*makaənaj ħo~u maʔmin mawɾaħ. o~u~u tatirəŋan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa saʡiməʦəɬ~ɮ saan, ʔʦa ka ʦi simaɾ ko~u~u titi nira, saka mataɾaw to~u~u siʔnaw. tano~u~u raʡit ħan nira mikarkar ko~u~u sra a misaɬ~ɮiħif , maɾo~u~u kaɬ~ɮiko~u~uan nira. ano~u~u kaʦiħraŋan i, mao~u~uɾaħ a miro~u~unaŋ i snasnaʡan . kafaħkaʡan i, mako~u~uraʦ ko~u~u kafo~u~utiʡan nira, nawħani, iraira aʦa ko~u~u kato~u~umaiʡan ato~u~u kamisiʡan nira i papo~u~utaɾ, ʦaaj pipatəɬ~ɮo~u~u. o~u~u pinaŋan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i, o~u~u masafəɾəŋaj a maɾaħakɾo~u~uŋ ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip naŋra, ira ko~u~u to~u~usaj-po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ko~u~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj. to~u~ura sasifo~u~uʡan naŋra a maɾaħakəɾo~u~uŋ i, ʦakaʔʦa ira ko~u~u *~* ʦi ħawikiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u ʦiʦiw a tawinaan a maɾaʦafaj. o~u~u ʡo~u~uto~u~ujan a fafo~u~uj ano~u~u sapiɾamo~u~uan ta miʦamo~u~uɾ a mikiħatija. na ħo~u~ufo~u~uʦən ko~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ** ko~u~u tawinaan ta paɾamo~u~u; *~* a miħʦaan ko~u~u ʡo~uto~ujan ta maŋaʡaj miɾamo~u~u. ***~*** a ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kaʦitijaɬ~ɮan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ʦʦaj ħo~u~ufo~u~uʦ *~* ko~u~u ʦiʦiw , ano~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj taħira i **, faɾo~u~u ɾipaj kanʦa mo~u~uʔtəp ɾipaj ta makto~u~un ko~u~u piʦo~u~uʦo~u~u. miħʦaʦaan no~u~u ʦaŋɾaħ ato~u~u ɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan no~u~u kaʦiħraŋan ato~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uo~u~uɬ~ɮan ko~u~u kaħo~u~ufo~u~uʦan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa. nano~u~u to~u~uʡasan no~u~u jiŋʦo~u~umin maʔmin o~u~u mafanaʡaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~u~up ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip; itija:ħo~u saħto~u~u o~u~u to~u~uməkɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u ɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ, (*).taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk mikarkar to~u~u sra a misakfəŋ , (*).mitəkər to~u~u waja misa fiħkaʦ, (*).patɾi to~u~u pijak . paɾitəmək to~u~u fanaʡ no~u~u tirəŋ . ʦʦaj ɾipaj kina ʦʦaj a miɾiso~u~uʡ, aɾtək safo~u~uɾafo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ sato~u~u awa ko~u~u tamaʡ. naw? i paɾapaɾa:aj aʦa ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u fafo~u~uj, mafanaʡ to~u~u sakaʡo~u~uripaw; saka, ʦaaj ka saɬ~ɮak to~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾimək i ɬ~ɮiħiɬ~ɮiħifan a mafo~u~utiʡ. saka, ʦitamaʡ ħo~u to~u~u fafo~u~uj ko~u~u miʡtiɾo~u~uaj i, o~u~u əɬ~ɮəf no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw a maħmək a maʡinaɾ. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, maɾaʦafaj ko~u~u *~* tamɬ~ɮaw a masaʦəfaŋ, ikaʡajaw ko~u~u waʦo~u~u tano~u~u ŋo~u~uso~u~uʡ ħan nira a miħipħip taħira ka tamaan. ano~u~u matama ko~u~u ʡo~u~uto~u~ujan a fafo~u~uj paɾa pinaʡo~u~un, iraaj ko~u~u raʡit nira sapiriʡaŋ, ʦaʦaj ko~u~u waʦo~u~u misiʡajaw ʦaaj ko~u~u papakafiɾo~u~u. anini ʡaɾo~u~umanto~u~u ko~u~u pakaənaj to~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i nijaro~u~uʡ, ano~u~u pakajniən i kaɾo~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u~u sakatanəktəkaw no~u~u tatirəŋan sanaj a ħaratəŋ ato~u~u saka iraaw to~u~u nikaira i, o~u~u kaŋaʡajan no~u~u mawmaħaj a mitanam pakaən.
S.FORM: == O fafoy no lotok == O fafoy no lotok hananay . o miri'angay to tamdaw . Mikari'ang aca to pinaloma a losay . Nanitini i tolo patek mitolo ko takaraw no lotok , tahini i hadhad ko piresapan no fafoy no lotok . Ano i pala to , i semosemotan , i 'aw'awlan ,itiniaca i pamatangan a hadhad , Ira ma'araw ko naripa'an nangra . Ano kasienawan , malokelon tayni i hadhad a miliyas to sienaw no lotok . Ano mahofoc ko tawinaan fafoy no lotok .ira ko sepat , oroma aenem saan ko kaci wawa ningra .Ora ciciw no fafoy , caay piliyas to wina , tahira i kato'asan ningra .So'elinay , safeleng saan cangra a miresap a talacowacowa , mikilim to kakaenen .O mikaenan no fafoy i , cowa kapili' , o 'arikak , fao , limit , o papah ,ato masamaamaanay a pinalengaw . Maemin a maemod nangra . O patinako no sowal to fafoy no lotok i hekal . o masililay , o matokaay sanay .Cowa kahatira ko pinangan no fafoy . Ya fafoy no lotok hananay , o ci'icelay , ratiktikay a rafihfih . cekak saan ko tangila , Ano masatamdaw to ka to'as nira ,matiyato o tofor ka tata'ang . sacira'it saan , o sapiri'ang nira to cimacima ato sapingorngor nira to sera . So'elinay , malitemoh no mi'adopay ko hatiniay a fafoy , pisafaloco' a misi'ayaw to kapiri'angaw ningra . o waco sato ko sapaosos milifet a makakalat .Iraay ko madoka'ay a waco to pina kalat nora fafoy . Matini i niyaro' . O katangican no mi'adopay a ci tama' ko fafoy no lotok . Ano ci tama' a mi'adop cangra . O tadamaanay a mi'adopay cingra sanay . Oroma sato pateli to saso'erec ato masamaamaanay a tilo . Ano pina a romi'ad , tayra miliso' tora tilo . alatek ira ko 'angtolay to , ira ko ma'oripay ho . Panokay sato tora tama' . Mipafetis to kalas no niyaro' ato pacakat itini i pita'ongan to mato'asay . Todong paliyaw ira ho kenaira a tama' . Mililiw ko loma' a mitahidang to salikaka mapolong malafi a komaen toyatama' .Ya tayraay malafi .mihawikid to takid to sapisolac to roray no mi'adopay . Kaniwen a mimaan . kaeso'ay makaen ko titi no fafoy no lotok . Tamekhan ko fanges nira . salangotngot sanay kiya .oya pasikaenhan to epah . tatodong sanay Fafuy pala—野豬 I luma'ay fafuy atu i palaay fafuy, tansul mahapinang ku nika sasiruma. U Fafuy Pala i, kakaya' ku pising, tata'ang ku funguh atu faluhang; ma'ipuc ku kaikur, miming ku wa'ay. U kakaya' nu tireng maedeng ccay laya' tahira ccay laya' ira ku pangkiw, u karteng 80~100 a tingting, u 'urip nira 10~21 ku mihcaan.U cengel nu fanuh nira i, matiya makusasay ku kakuhting, ira ku matiyaay u pangsuy. Maedef i kitakit ku lenak nu Fafuy pala, dengan makdalay , takaraway lutuk atu kietecay pala caay katatudung tu Fafuy pala. Kakaenen nu Fafuy pala, u rengus, heci nu kilang, lamit, fau^, fita'ol, 'du, 'uner,takulil atu mihufucan ho a malunem…makaenay ho ma^min mawlah. U tatirengan nu Fafuy pala sa'imeced saan, ^ca ka ci simal ku titi nira, saka matalaw tu si^naw. Tanu ra'it han nira mikarkar ku sra a misadihif , malu kadikuan nira. Anu kacihrangan i, maulah a mirunang i snasna'an . Kafahka'an i, makurac ku kafuti'an nira, nawhani, iraira aca ku katumai'an atu kamisi'an nira i paputal, caay pipatedu. U pinangan nu Fafuy pala i, u masafelengay a malahaklung ku 'urip nangra, ira ku tusay-pulu' ku kaadihay. Tura sasifu'an nangra a malahakelung i, caka^ca ira ku 2~3 ci hawikiday tu ciciw a tawinaan a malacafay. U 'utuyan a fafuy anu sapilamuan ta micamul a mikihatiya. Na hufucen ku Fafuy pala, 18 ku tawinaan ta palamu; 3~4 a mihcaan ku 'otoyan ta manga'ay milamu. 112~130 a rumi'ad ku kacitiyadan nu Fafuy pala, ccay hufuc 2~6 ku ciciw , anu adihay tahira i 12, falu lipay kanca mu^tep lipay ta maktun ku picucu. Mihcacaan nu canglah atu lala'edan nu kacihrangan atu laluudan ku kahufucan nu Fafuy pala. Nanu tu'asan nu Yingcumin ma^min u mafana'ay a mi'adup ku 'urip; itiya:ho sahtu u tumekday ku luwad, (1).Tala lutuk mikarkar tu sra a misakfeng , (2).Miteker tu Waya misa fihkac, (3).Patli tu piyak . Palitemek tu fana' nu tireng . Ccay lipay kina ccay a milisu', altek safulafulad satu awa ku tama'. Naw? I palapala:ay aca ku 'urip nu Fafuy, mafana' tu saka'uripaw; saka, caay ka sadak tu rumi'ad, milimek i dihidihifan a mafuti'. Saka, citama' ho tu Fafuy ku mi'tiluay i, u edef nu niyaru'ay tamdaw a mahmek a ma'inal. Ruma satu, malacafay ku 2~3 tamdaw a masacefang, ika'ayaw ku wacu tanu ngusu' han nira a mihiphip tahira ka tamaan. Anu matama ku 'utuyan a Fafuy pala pina'un, iraay ku ra'it nira sapiri'ang, cacay ku wacu misi'ayaw caay ku papakafilu. Anini 'alumantu ku pakaenay tu Fafuy pala i niyaru', anu pakaynien i kalumuwad nu sakatanektekaw nu tatirengan sanay a harateng atu saka iraaw tu nikaira i, u kanga'ayan nu mawmahay a mitanam pakaen.
S.PHON: == o~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk == o~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk ħananaj . o~u miriʡaŋaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw . mikariʡaŋ aʦa to~u pinaɾo~uma a ɾo~usaj . nanitini i to~uɾo~u patək mito~uɾo~u ko~u takaraw no~u ɾo~uto~uk , taħini i ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ ko~u pirəsapan no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u i paɾa to~u , i səmo~usəmo~utan , i ʡawʡawɾan ,itiniaʦa i pamataŋan a ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ , ira maʡaraw ko~u naripaʡan naŋra . ano~u kasiənawan , maɾo~ukəɾo~un tajni i ħaɬ~ɮħaɬ~ɮ a miɾijas to~u siənaw no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u maħo~ufo~uʦ ko~u tawinaan fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk .ira ko~u səpat , o~uro~uma aənəm saan ko~u kaʦi wawa niŋra .o~ura ʦiʦiw no~u fafo~uj , ʦaaj piɾijas to~u wina , taħira i kato~uʡasan niŋra .so~uʡəɾinaj , safəɾəŋ saan ʦaŋra a mirəsap a taɾaʦo~uwaʦo~uwa , mikiɾim to~u kakaənən .o~u mikaənan no~u fafo~uj i , ʦo~uwa kapiɾiʡ , o~u ʡarikak , fao~u , ɾimit , o~u papaħ ,ato~u masamaamaanaj a pinaɾəŋaw . maəmin a maəmo~uɬ~ɮ naŋra . o~u patinako~u no~u so~uwaɾ to~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk i ħəkaɾ . o~u masiɾiɾaj , o~u mato~ukaaj sanaj .ʦo~uwa kaħatira ko~u pinaŋan no~u fafo~uj . ja fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk ħananaj , o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj , ratiktikaj a rafiħfiħ . ʦəkak saan ko~u taŋiɾa , ano~u masatamɬ~ɮaw to~u ka to~uʡas nira ,matijato~u o~u to~ufo~ur ka tataʡaŋ . saʦiraʡit saan , o~u sapiriʡaŋ nira to~u ʦimaʦima ato~u sapiŋo~urŋo~ur nira to~u səra . so~uʡəɾinaj , maɾitəmo~uħ no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ko~u ħatiniaj a fafo~uj , pisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a misiʡajaw to~u kapiriʡaŋaw niŋra . o~u waʦo~u sato~u ko~u sapao~uso~us miɾifət a makakaɾat .iraaj ko~u maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj a waʦo~u to~u pina kaɾat no~ura fafo~uj . matini i nijaro~uʡ . o~u kataŋiʦan no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj a ʦi tamaʡ ko~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . ano~u ʦi tamaʡ a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ʦaŋra . o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj ʦiŋra sanaj . o~uro~uma sato~u patəɾi to~u saso~uʡərəʦ ato~u masamaamaanaj a tiɾo~u . ano~u pina a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ , tajra miɾiso~uʡ to~ura tiɾo~u . aɾatək ira ko~u ʡaŋto~uɾaj to~u , ira ko~u maʡo~uripaj ħo~u . pano~ukaj sato~u to~ura tamaʡ . mipafətis to~u kaɾas no~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u paʦakat itini i pitaʡo~uŋan to~u mato~uʡasaj . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paɾijaw ira ħo~u kənaira a tamaʡ . miɾiɾiw ko~u ɾo~umaʡ a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u saɾikaka mapo~uɾo~uŋ maɾafi a ko~umaən to~ujatamaʡ .ja tajraaj maɾafi .miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u takiɬ~ɮ to~u sapiso~uɾaʦ to~u ro~uraj no~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj . kaniwən a mimaan . kaəso~uʡaj makaən ko~u titi no~u fafo~uj no~u ɾo~uto~uk . taməkħan ko~u faŋəs nira . saɾaŋo~utŋo~ut sanaj kija .o~uja pasikaənħan to~u əpaħ . tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sanaj fafo~u~uj paɾa*** i ɾo~u~umaʡaj fafo~u~uj ato~u~u i paɾaaj fafo~u~uj, tanso~u~uɾ maħapinaŋ ko~u~u nika sasiro~u~uma. o~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i, kakajaʡ ko~u~u pisiŋ, tataʡaŋ ko~u~u fo~u~uŋo~u~uħ ato~u~u faɾo~u~uħaŋ; maʡipo~u~uʦ ko~u~u kaiko~u~ur, mimiŋ ko~u~u waʡaj. o~u~u kakajaʡ no~u~u tirəŋ maəɬ~ɮəŋ ʦʦaj ɾajaʡ taħira ʦʦaj ɾajaʡ ira ko~u~u paŋkiw, o~u~u kartəŋ **~*** a tiŋtiŋ, o~u~u ʡo~u~urip nira **~** ko~u~u miħʦaan.o~u~u ʦəŋəɾ no~u~u fano~u~uħ nira i, matija mako~u~usasaj ko~u~u kako~u~uħtiŋ, ira ko~u~u matijaaj o~u~u paŋso~u~uj. maəɬ~ɮəf i kitakit ko~u~u ɾənak no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ɬ~ɮəŋan makɬ~ɮaɾaj , takarawaj ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ato~u~u kiətəʦaj paɾa ʦaaj katato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa. kakaənən no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, o~u~u rəŋo~u~us, ħəʦi no~u~u kiɾaŋ, ɾamit, fao~u~uʔ, fitaʡo~uɾ, ʡɬ~ɮo~u~u, ʡo~u~unər,tako~u~uɾiɾ ato~u~u miħo~u~ufo~u~uʦan ħo~u a maɾo~u~unəm*makaənaj ħo~u maʔmin mawɾaħ. o~u~u tatirəŋan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa saʡiməʦəɬ~ɮ saan, ʔʦa ka ʦi simaɾ ko~u~u titi nira, saka mataɾaw to~u~u siʔnaw. tano~u~u raʡit ħan nira mikarkar ko~u~u sra a misaɬ~ɮiħif , maɾo~u~u kaɬ~ɮiko~u~uan nira. ano~u~u kaʦiħraŋan i, mao~u~uɾaħ a miro~u~unaŋ i snasnaʡan . kafaħkaʡan i, mako~u~uraʦ ko~u~u kafo~u~utiʡan nira, nawħani, iraira aʦa ko~u~u kato~u~umaiʡan ato~u~u kamisiʡan nira i papo~u~utaɾ, ʦaaj pipatəɬ~ɮo~u~u. o~u~u pinaŋan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i, o~u~u masafəɾəŋaj a maɾaħakɾo~u~uŋ ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip naŋra, ira ko~u~u to~u~usaj-po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ko~u~u kaaɬ~ɮiħaj. to~u~ura sasifo~u~uʡan naŋra a maɾaħakəɾo~u~uŋ i, ʦakaʔʦa ira ko~u~u *~* ʦi ħawikiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u ʦiʦiw a tawinaan a maɾaʦafaj. o~u~u ʡo~u~uto~u~ujan a fafo~u~uj ano~u~u sapiɾamo~u~uan ta miʦamo~u~uɾ a mikiħatija. na ħo~u~ufo~u~uʦən ko~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ** ko~u~u tawinaan ta paɾamo~u~u; *~* a miħʦaan ko~u~u ʡo~uto~ujan ta maŋaʡaj miɾamo~u~u. ***~*** a ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kaʦitijaɬ~ɮan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa, ʦʦaj ħo~u~ufo~u~uʦ *~* ko~u~u ʦiʦiw , ano~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj taħira i **, faɾo~u~u ɾipaj kanʦa mo~u~uʔtəp ɾipaj ta makto~u~un ko~u~u piʦo~u~uʦo~u~u. miħʦaʦaan no~u~u ʦaŋɾaħ ato~u~u ɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮan no~u~u kaʦiħraŋan ato~u~u ɾaɾo~u~uo~u~uɬ~ɮan ko~u~u kaħo~u~ufo~u~uʦan no~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa. nano~u~u to~u~uʡasan no~u~u jiŋʦo~u~umin maʔmin o~u~u mafanaʡaj a miʡaɬ~ɮo~u~up ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip; itija:ħo~u saħto~u~u o~u~u to~u~uməkɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u ɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ, (*).taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk mikarkar to~u~u sra a misakfəŋ , (*).mitəkər to~u~u waja misa fiħkaʦ, (*).patɾi to~u~u pijak . paɾitəmək to~u~u fanaʡ no~u~u tirəŋ . ʦʦaj ɾipaj kina ʦʦaj a miɾiso~u~uʡ, aɾtək safo~u~uɾafo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ sato~u~u awa ko~u~u tamaʡ. naw? i paɾapaɾa:aj aʦa ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u fafo~u~uj, mafanaʡ to~u~u sakaʡo~u~uripaw; saka, ʦaaj ka saɬ~ɮak to~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾimək i ɬ~ɮiħiɬ~ɮiħifan a mafo~u~utiʡ. saka, ʦitamaʡ ħo~u to~u~u fafo~u~uj ko~u~u miʡtiɾo~u~uaj i, o~u~u əɬ~ɮəf no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw a maħmək a maʡinaɾ. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, maɾaʦafaj ko~u~u *~* tamɬ~ɮaw a masaʦəfaŋ, ikaʡajaw ko~u~u waʦo~u~u tano~u~u ŋo~u~uso~u~uʡ ħan nira a miħipħip taħira ka tamaan. ano~u~u matama ko~u~u ʡo~u~uto~u~ujan a fafo~u~uj paɾa pinaʡo~u~un, iraaj ko~u~u raʡit nira sapiriʡaŋ, ʦaʦaj ko~u~u waʦo~u~u misiʡajaw ʦaaj ko~u~u papakafiɾo~u~u. anini ʡaɾo~u~umanto~u~u ko~u~u pakaənaj to~u~u fafo~u~uj paɾa i nijaro~u~uʡ, ano~u~u pakajniən i kaɾo~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u~u sakatanəktəkaw no~u~u tatirəŋan sanaj a ħaratəŋ ato~u~u saka iraaw to~u~u nikaira i, o~u~u kaŋaʡajan no~u~u mawmaħaj a mitanam pakaən.
